description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the erlang:19.3 Docker image. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -y, installs g++-4.9 with apt-get -y install g++-4.9, and sets the CXX environment variable to g++-4.9. Define a test job in the default test stage that executes ./support/rebar3 eunit. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
